Class BotStateDelta

java.lang.Object
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessageLite
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessage
com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage
com.soulfiremc.grpc.generated.BotStateDelta
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.google.protobuf.Message, com.google.protobuf.MessageLite, com.google.protobuf.MessageLiteOrBuilder, com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder, BotStateDeltaOrBuilder, Serializable
@Generated public final class BotStateDelta extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage implements BotStateDeltaOrBuilder
Partial update to the bot's live state. Only fields present have changed
since the last delta or snapshot. Clients should merge deltas onto their
local copy of BotLiveState.
Protobuf type soulfire.v1.BotStateDelta
See Also:
